h1.visual_description: Not present in this sample; typically reserved for chapter titles in this academic monograph style.

h2.visual_description: All-caps, sans-serif or small-caps serif, used for figure labels within the margin or caption area.

h3.visual_description: Italicized serif font, slightly larger or distinct from body text, used for figure titles.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small-scale text block at the bottom of columns separated by a horizontal rule
Text block positioned to the right of a large image with specific metadata
Superscript Arabic numerals within body text

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Chicago-style footnotes (Author, Title, Publication Info, Year)

layout_info.primary_flow: two-column (as evidenced by the text split below the image)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left: Page number (e.g., 74); Top right: Author surname (e.g., BAIRD)
